title: Steamed Xiaolongbao with Mildly Sour Dipping Sauce
description: A traditional Chinese soup dumpling recipe filled with pork and served with a mildly sour dipping sauce. This dish is a variation of the classic Xiaolongbao from the Jiangsu province.
instructions: 1. Soak the Xiaolongbao in warm water for 10 minutes to rehydrate.
2. In a pan, combine the mildly sour vinegar, soy sauce, and sugar. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
3. Add the crumbled tofu to the pan and stir until the sauce has thickened.
4. Add the chopped scallions to the pan and stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Steam the Xiaolongbao for 8-10 minutes, or until the dumplings are cooked through.
6. Serve the steamed Xiaolongbao with the mildly sour dipping sauce.
8. Garnish with additional scallions if desired.
